EnrolledEntrant - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Represents a user who has successfully enrolled in an event.
EnrolledEntrant() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.EnrolledEntrant
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
EnrolledEntrant(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.EnrolledEntrant
Constructs an EnrolledEntrant with all details.
EnrolledEntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
RecyclerView adapter used to display enrolled entrants The adapter binds EnrolledEntrant objects to the enrolled_entrant.xml Displays: participant name, participant email, enrollment status Used by EnrolledFragment to render the list of confirmed participants
EnrolledEntrantAdapter(Context, ArrayList<EnrolledEntrant>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.EnrolledEntrantAdapter
Creates a new adapter for enrolled entrants

Represents an applicant/entrant for an event waitlist.

Constructs a new Entrant.

Enumeration of possible statuses for an entrant.

Adapter class for a RecyclerView that displays a list of Entrant objects.
